title: CLI platform: scaffold, core, workflow model, and commands

feat: urlUtils.ts add URL parsing and download helpers

feat: indexes.ts add workflow index registry
feat: differ.ts add colored diff output for workflows
feat: step.ts add Step model with managed detection
feat: job.ts add Job model wrapping workflow steps
feat: workflow.ts add Workflow YAML parser
feat: check.ts add check result types and formatting
feat: checker.ts add local vs remote workflow comparison
feat: merger.ts add remote change application logic
feat: resource.ts add workflow file loading resource
feat: workflowIndex.ts add index URL workflow resolver
feat: cli.ts add CLI argument parsing and help
feat: runCheck.ts add check command for workflow validation
feat: runUpdate.ts add update command for workflow sync
feat: runList.ts add list command for available workflows
feat: inquire.ts add interactive workflow prompts

feat: index.ts wire CLI args to command handlers
feat: ghactions.js add CLI binary shim
